description: simple_hash uses h=7 then h=(h*31+ord(ch))%1000000007 per char; dictionary_attack returns the matching word or ""; salted_hash hashes salt+password.
dictionary_attack reuses simple_hash to test each word, and salted_hash prepends the salt so identical passwords get different hashes.
Clear names, reuses simple_hash instead of rewriting the loop, a return on every path.
